systemBots.name: Pawn Pusher
systemBots.description: A beginner bot that pushes pawns forward eagerly
systemBots.weakness: Any coordinated piece play
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent only pushes pawns early. Develop your pieces and you'll win.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Extremely predictable opening moves.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Sharpen or Tactical Focus to punish overextended pawns.

systemBots.name: Knight Hopper
systemBots.description: Loves jumping knights around the board
systemBots.weakness: Strong positional play and center control
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent loves surprise knight attacks. Control the center to limit its knights.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Aggressively develops knights, loves forks.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Iron Defense to avoid blunders from knight forks.

systemBots.name: Bishop Slider
systemBots.weakness: Solid opening repertoire neutralizes diagonal pressure
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent pins pieces to your king. Learn solid openings to counter.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Strong diagonal play, uses pins and skewers.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Opening Prep to neutralize its diagonal pressure.

systemBots.name: Rook Roller
systemBots.weakness: Aggressive openings that create early pressure
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent wants a long game. Attack early before it can consolidate.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Plays conservatively, trades down to endgames.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Aggression Surge to attack before it reaches the endgame.

systemBots.name: Castle Guard
systemBots.description: Always castles early and defends the king
systemBots.weakness: Well-rounded training across all attributes
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent studies YOU. Only a well-rounded bot can win.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Adapts strategy based on your bot's weaknesses.
systemBots.counterPrep: Stack buffs: Sharpen + Tactical Focus to break through its defenses.

systemBots.name: Pin Master
systemBots.weakness: Keeping pieces unaligned avoids pins
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent will pin your pieces to your king. Don't leave pieces on diagonals.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Patient, waits for pinning opportunities.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Iron Defense + Lucky Break to survive tactical threats.

systemBots.name: Fork Finder
systemBots.weakness: Limiting knight outposts through pawn structure
systemBots.scoutText: Watch for double attacks. Keep your king and queen separated.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Aggressive knight maneuvers, seeks double attacks.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Sharpen to see forks coming and avoid them.

systemBots.name: Center Controller
systemBots.weakness: Flank attacks that bypass the center
systemBots.scoutText: Don't fight for the center directly. Attack from the flanks.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Classical style, controls d4/d5/e4/e5.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Aggression Surge to launch flank attacks.

systemBots.name: File Opener
systemBots.description: Opens files and invades with heavy pieces
systemBots.weakness: Closed positions that deny open files
systemBots.scoutText: Keep the position closed. Don't let it trade pawns to open files.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Seeks pawn exchanges, invades on open files.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Opening Prep for a closed structure + Iron Defense.

systemBots.name: Endgame Grinder
systemBots.weakness: Aggressive middlegame that doesn't simplify
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent thrives in endgames. Win before you get there.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Trades pieces, converts small advantages in endgames.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Aggression Surge + Tactical Focus to win in the middlegame.

systemBots.name: Tempo Hunter
systemBots.weakness: Solid defensive setups that deny tempo gains
systemBots.scoutText: Every move threatens something. Be ready to defend actively.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Constant pressure, never a wasted move.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Iron Defense + Endgame Study to weather the storm.

systemBots.name: Space Invader
systemBots.weakness: Counterattacking play that punishes overextension
systemBots.scoutText: It will grab space. Strike back when it overextends.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Pawn-heavy expansions, restricts your pieces.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Tactical Focus + Second Wind for a counterattack.

systemBots.name: Quiet Assassin
systemBots.description: Makes strong quiet moves that build pressure
systemBots.weakness: Direct tactical confrontation
systemBots.scoutText: This opponent wins slowly. Force sharp positions where tactics decide.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Quiet moves, gradual pressure, no obvious threats.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Sharpen + Aggression Surge to create chaos.

systemBots.name: Exchange Master
systemBots.description: Knows when to trade and when to keep pieces
systemBots.weakness: Imbalanced positions where material count is unequal
systemBots.scoutText: It trades perfectly. Create imbalances — sacrifice material for initiative.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Precise exchanges, always trades favorably.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Adrenaline + Tactical Focus for sharp sacrificial play.

systemBots.name: Prophylaxis Pro
systemBots.description: Prevents opponent plans before executing own
systemBots.weakness: Multiple simultaneous threats it can't all prevent
systemBots.scoutText: It prevents your plans. Create two threats at once to overwhelm it.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Defensive genius, stops your ideas before they happen.
systemBots.counterPrep: Stack all buffs: Sharpen + Tactical Focus + Aggression Surge.

systemBots.name: Calculation Engine
systemBots.weakness: Positional complexity where calculation alone isn't enough
systemBots.scoutText: It out-calculates you. Play for positional subtleties instead.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Deep calculation, finds long forced lines.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Meditation + Opening Prep for positional edge.

systemBots.name: Positional Sage
systemBots.weakness: Sharp tactical complications
systemBots.scoutText: Don't play a quiet game — it wins those. Create tactical chaos.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Never blunders, perfect piece placement.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Tactical Focus + Aggression Surge + Adrenaline.

systemBots.name: Tactical Storm
systemBots.weakness: Solid prophylactic play that denies tactics
systemBots.scoutText: It will find tactics you didn't see. Play solid and don't give chances.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Seeks complications, sacrifices for initiative.
systemBots.counterPrep: Use Iron Defense + Endgame Study + Deep Thought.

systemBots.name: Grandmaster Ghost
systemBots.weakness: Nothing obvious — only a fully trained bot can compete
systemBots.scoutText: This is a true test. Bring every buff and powerup you have.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Near-perfect play in all phases.
systemBots.counterPrep: Maximum preparation: stack every buff available.

systemBots.name: Stockfish Ceiling
systemBots.description: The ultimate challenge - full engine strength
systemBots.weakness: None — this is the ceiling
systemBots.scoutText: Depth 22, zero blunders, perfect play. Only a fully evolved bot with perfect prep can survive.
systemBots.playStyleHint: Perfect calculation in all positions.
systemBots.counterPrep: You'll need everything: all buffs, all powerups, and a fully trained ML model.
